task_completion.description: Open the 'Redraw the given image' activity in GCompris
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris application window is visible, displaying the 'Redraw the given image' activity which features a reference grid and an interactive blank grid.

task_completion.description: Ensure Level 1 of the activity is being played
task_completion.visual_evidence: The level indicator in the GCompris UI shows that it is on the first level (e.g., 1st star highlighted, or a simple initial reference pattern).

task_completion.description: Begin copying the reference pattern to the blank grid
task_completion.visual_evidence: Some cells in the interactive grid have been clicked and colored in, correctly matching the corresponding positions in the reference grid.

task_completion.description: Successfully copy the entire reference pattern to complete the level
task_completion.visual_evidence: The interactive grid exactly matches the reference grid, or a success/completion animation (such as a smiling face, stars, or a prompt to advance to the next level) is visible.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the completed level to /home/ga/redraw_complete.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot tool interface, terminal command (e.g., using scrot, gnome-screenshot, or import), or file manager shows the image being saved to or existing exactly at the path '/home/ga/redraw_complete.png'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GCompris software
integrity.visual_evidence: The GCompris UI is visible with its standard icons, menus, and window decorations, rather than a web browser or image editor showing a picture of GCompris.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GUI to draw the pattern
integrity.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor is seen moving across and clicking the grid cells within the GCompris application over multiple frames, rather than the grid magically filling instantly via a script.

integrity.description: The agent actually captured a screenshot of the completed state
integrity.visual_evidence: A screenshot utility or a terminal command taking a screenshot is visible, rather than the agent just copying a pre-existing file to the target path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/redraw_complete.png.
